title: Zoro Falls and Listens
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on zoro falls and listens, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Zoro Falls and Listens. Zoro pushes past his limits against Mr. 1 and discovers the state of mind needed to cut steel. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You got my goggles back! Samji, you sure are one great fr-

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Aghhh! Hey, this is broken! What the hell man!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: This was the latest Odel from North Blue! Do you have any idea 'OW much I payed for these!?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: That must be the rebel reinforcement storming this way...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The hell are you actin' all tough for, you damned camel!? Where were you during the fight?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let's hurry to the palace. We might be able to help Vivi somehow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, usop! Get off your ass already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: C'mon guys! Just look at how injured I am! You expect me to run like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: If Crocodile is really here in the palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then that means he really IS the one trying to take over the kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Seems like there's quite a fuss just outside the door.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Forgive me... for spam- dering the chance to save this kingdom,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: that you risked your life to get...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let go of his highness, Croco- Dile!

summary: This part develops zoro falls and listens and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
